title: Fix new <obj> shallow copy not preserving polymorphic runtime type (#7105)

features.name: shallow copy through base handle to derived object
features.description: Code should include a shallow copy constructor `copy = new source_handle` where source_handle is a base-class variable holding a derived-class object reference, assigned via polymorphic assignment prior to the copy operation

features.name: virtual method dispatch on shallow copied object
features.description: Code should include virtual method calls on a shallow-copied object where the copy was created via `new source_handle` through a base-class handle, demonstrating that virtual dispatch resolves to the derived runtime type
